why_it_matters: Documenting the completed PRAPARE screen—especially infrequent social contact suggesting isolation in an 85-year-old—supports completeness and may flag a psychosocial need warranting follow-up.
Discontinuing a duplicate statin identified on reconciliation prevents redundant therapy and potential toxicity, and its documentation confirms an accurate medication list.
Recording counseling on the periodontal–cardiovascular link reinforces the dental referral rationale and patient education for this cardiac patient.
